patterns_recognized: HARD CAP 1 (negative-edge GOLD) validated 5+ consecutive times without exception — PHI@PIT (-4.78pp), TOR@DET (-1.72pp), NYY@NYM (-5.63pp), SD@SEA (-2.52pp) all correctly zero-stake today; even large F-signals (F3=4875 for TOR, F1*+F2 for NYY) cannot override when edge is negative. Market consistently holds superior same-day SP information.

Three-signal GOLD bar (F-signal fire + positive edge > 4pp + f5_full_delta < 0.15 + no stacked flags) is 4-for-4 in the postgame archive; CIN@CLE (Bibee vs Abbott, F1*+F5 backup, edge=+7.1pp, delta=0.04) is today's only game clearing all four conditions — confidence_downgrade+bullpen_fatigue present but per 05-12 rule, stacked flags alone without secondary signal (delta<0.15, fair_prob>0.42, gap<12pp) do NOT mandate DOWNGRADE.

Stacked-flags DOWNGRADE requires secondary signal before applying to positive-edge GOLD picks; 05-12 CHC@ATL lesson confirmed — flags alone at GOLD tier reduce confidence but do not mandate DOWNGRADE absent f5_full_delta > 0.15, fair_prob < 0.42, or market disagreement > 12pp.

PLATINUM scrutiny: both PLATINUM picks today (BOS@ATL, SF@OAK) warrant review. BOS@ATL: f5_full_delta=0.1831 exceeds the 0.15 Heuristic 5 threshold (ATL wins F5 only 48.23%, Strider's 2026 Statcast data thin per 'SP edge unconfirmed' grade note), making ATL's thesis bullpen-dependent — DOWNGRADE to GOLD. SF@OAK: f5_full_delta=0.0985 well below 0.15, p_model=0.6353 not in artifact range, game very consistent — CONFIRM at PLATINUM.

OVERRIDE four-condition trigger (f5_full_delta > 0.20 + stacked flags + fair_prob < 0.42 + confirmed quality opposing SP) validated 6+ times; no today's game fully meets all four conditions — KC@STL has f5_full_delta=0.2416 and SP/PQI against STL but lacks stacked flags and fair_prob above 0.42, preventing OVERRIDE to KC.

PHI @ PIT.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 correctly fires (edge=-4.78pp → score 4→1, zero stake). Aaron Nola (PHI) is an elite SP; market prices PIT at 56.24% vs model's 51.46% — market knows Nola's quality. F1_xera_gap=2.20* (Braxton Ashcraft thin Statcast sample) and F3=2474 + PQI=+22.5 support PIT direction, but negative edge overrides. PHI's Schwarber/Harper lineup is strong vs RHP. PIT direction credible; no stake warranted against Nola.

BAL @ WSH.reasoning: D grade (score=-1) correctly assigned: Shane Baz (BAL) rated 3.0 xERA better than Zack Littell (WSH), which is the SP edge AGAINST the WSH pick. PQI also against WSH (Δ=-26.4). Only F3=2637.6 supports WSH direction. Market prices WSH at only 43.2% (fair_prob) vs model's 54.73% — market agrees SP is the story. Both quality signals run against WSH; SKIP with no stake is correct.

TOR @ DET.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 fires (edge=-1.72pp → score 3→1, zero stake). Trey Yesavage (TOR) dominates F5 at 69.15% vs Brenan Hanifee (DET), but f5_full_delta=0.1692 > 0.15 triggers Heuristic 5: TOR's full-game thesis requires bullpen carry. bullpen_fatigue=True + confidence_downgrade=True stack this concern. Per 05-09, Stage 1/2 gap 16pp+ combined with bullpen_fatigue is a reliable contra-indicator. TOR direction credible; no stake.

CIN @ CLE.reasoning: CONFIRM GOLD — three-signal bar cleanly met (4-for-4 in archive). Tanner Bibee (CLE) vs Andrew Abbott (CIN): F1_xera_gap=1.30* backed by F5_bullpen_gap=+0.84 satisfies HARD CAP 5 (secondary signal prevents sole-F1* demotion). Edge=+7.06pp in [4,15]pp band. f5_full_delta=0.038 well below 0.15 threshold. PQI confirms (+14.9). pen_strain_pick_side=0.1139 (HIGH): CIN's bullpen will be tested by CLE's lineup. Stacked flags present but no secondary downgrade signal per 05-12 rule.

MIA @ TB.reasoning: SKIP correctly applied (edge=+3.59pp outside [4,15]pp band). D grade (score=-1): Janson Junk (MIA) rated 0.60 xERA better than Ian Seymour (TB) in the model's scoring, PQI against TB (Δ=-12.1). f5_full_delta=0.2255 is large — MIA wins F5 at 65.74%, TB's full-game thesis entirely bullpen-dependent. bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade stacked. OVERRIDE to MIA considered but fair_prob=0.5323 (above 0.42 floor) and no stacked pipeline flags prevent full OVERRIDE trigger.

MIL @ MIN.reasoning: Coleman Crow (MIL) confirmed starting per MLB API but has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date; the SP quality score cannot be computed without 100+ pitch threshold. Joe Ryan (MIN) is confirmed. PENDING designation is correct per validated protocol (5+ archive confirmations including 05-14 where MIN won 9-1 with same Crow designation). MIL 24-17 vs MIN 20-24; directional lean to MIL qualitatively but no formalizable pick.

BOS @ ATL.reasoning: DOWNGRADE PLATINUM→GOLD. Spencer Strider (ATL) vs Connelly Early (BOS): grade_reasons show 'SP edge unconfirmed' — Strider has thin 2026 Statcast data (returning from injury), preventing F1 from firing. f5_full_delta=0.1831 exceeds Heuristic 5 threshold (0.15): ATL wins F5 only 48.23%, full-game thesis requires bullpen carry. BOS HL bullpen marginally better (gap=+0.0118). ATL 30-14 vs BOS 18-25, F2=0.029 and F3=5596 support ATL at GOLD. PLATINUM without confirmed SP edge is unjustified.

NYY @ NYM.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 fires (edge=-5.63pp → score 4→1, zero stake). Cam Schlittler (NYY) vs Clay Holmes (NYM): F1_xera_gap=2.38* (Schlittler thin sample) + F2=0.027 and PQI=-18.4 support NYY direction. Market gives NYY 58.16% vs model's 52.53% — market significantly more bullish on NYY. f5_full_delta=0.1376 (NYM/Holmes wins F5) adds late-game uncertainty. NYY 27-17 vs NYM 18-25 supports directional call. No stake per HARD CAP 1.

CHC @ CHW.reasoning: SKIP correctly applied: no F-signal (F1/F2/F3/F4/F5) fires — SP edge and PQI drive the A- grade but without an F-signal the tier stays SKIP. Sean Burke (CHW) vs Edward Cabrera (CHC): model sees 0.53 xERA edge for Burke. fair_prob=0.4466 below the 0.42 floor by standard metrics; market prices CHC (28-16) as stronger than CHW (22-21). CHC lineup (Bregman, Happ, Suzuki) shows clearly stronger batter splits vs RHP than CHW's lineup. Confidence_downgrade + bullpen_fatigue confirm SKIP posture.

TEX @ HOU.reasoning: D grade (score=-1) correctly assigned: Jack Leiter (TEX) rated 0.79 xERA better than Spencer Arrighetti (HOU) — SP edge AGAINST HOU pick. PQI against HOU (Δ=-10.1). acute_roster flag signals HOU lineup disruption. confidence_downgrade=True. HOU is 17-28 (poorest record on slate). Despite F3=3594.8 firing and positive edge=+6.3pp, SP and PQI structural signals dominate. SKIP with no stake is correct.

KC @ STL.reasoning: D grade (score=-3), worst on slate. Michael Wacha (KC) rated 0.99 xERA better than Dustin May (STL) — strong SP edge AGAINST STL. PQI against STL (Δ=-17.9). f5_full_delta=0.2416 is extreme: KC wins F5 at 59.65% (Wacha dominant), STL's full-game thesis requires a major late reversal. Market prices as coin flip (50.14%) vs model's 64.52% for STL — massive gap. OVERRIDE to KC considered but no stacked pipeline flags (confidence_downgrade=False, no acute_roster) — four-condition trigger incomplete.

ARI @ COL.reasoning: CONFIRM SKIP/D — Coors Field park effect, not model artifact. Kyle Freeland (COL) vs Merrill Kelly (ARI): Freeland rated 4.74 xERA better than Kelly at Coors, driving COL to win F5 at 89.21%. f5_full_delta=0.3947 is extreme but market gives ARI 53.12% (fair_prob) — market agrees with ARI full-game direction because Coors bullpen collapses in innings 6-9 are systematic. Both model and market point to ARI for the full game. D grade (score=-4) correctly reflects structural uncertainty. CONFIRM no-stake.

LAD @ LAA.reasoning: Two SKIP triggers fire: model_prob=0.8133 outside [0.48,0.72] range AND edge=+15.57pp just above 15pp band ceiling. Will Klein (LAD) vs Jack Kochanowicz (LAA): SP edge=2.15 xERA for LAD (small-sample at 70 PAs, +1 not +2). F2=0.035 fires. LAD's lineup (Ohtani, Betts, Tucker) is elite. f5_full_delta=0.2192 (LAD improves from F5 to full game). PQI confirms strongly (Δ=-33.4). SKIP correctly applied due to extreme model_prob and edge ceiling breach despite genuine LAD quality edge.

SD @ SEA.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 fires (edge=-2.52pp → score 4→1, zero stake). Emerson Hancock (SEA) vs Randy Vásquez (SD): F1_xera_gap=0.85* (thin Hancock Statcast sample) + F3=2929.6, PQI=+8.4 confirm SEA. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0196 (SEA HL bullpen meaningfully better than SD's — mild CONFIRM signal). f5_full_delta=0.0062 (perfectly tight, game consistent across phases). Market gives SEA 55.70% vs model's 53.18% — market more bullish on SEA. Direction credible; no stake.

SF @ OAK.reasoning: CONFIRM PLATINUM. Aaron Civale (OAK) vs Tyler Mahle (SF): F2=0.033 and F3=6350.2 both fire, edge=+8.69pp in band, f5_full_delta=0.0985 (very tight, OAK consistent across all phases). PQI confirms (+7.9). p_model=0.6353 is NOT in artifact range (< 0.85) and f5_full_delta=0.0985 is well below 0.20 — HARD CAP 3 does not apply. pen_strain_pick_side=0.1126 (HIGH): SF's bullpen will be stressed by OAK's top order (Kurtz at 1.116 OPS vs RHP). Stacked flags present but no secondary downgrade signal per 05-12 rule (delta < 0.15, fair_prob > 0.42, gap < 12pp).
